headline: Comcast Corporation and Comcast Cable Communications, LLC Announce Results and Upsize of their Offers to Purchase for Cash Certain of their Outstanding Senior Debt Securities
summary: PHILADELPHIA, June 03, 2026--Comcast Corporation, a Pennsylvania corporation (the "Company") announced results of its previously announced cash tender offers to purchase any and all of its outstanding 2.350% Notes due 2027; 3.300% Notes due February 2027; 3.300% Notes due April 2027; 4.150% Notes due 2028; 3.150% Notes due 2028; 3.550% Notes due 2028; 5.100% Notes due 2029; 4.550% Notes due 2029; 4.250% Notes due 2030; 3.400% Notes due 2030 and 2.650% Notes due 2030 (together, the "Company Notes

headline: Universal theme park gets £1.3bn taxpayer support - as name is revealed
summary: Europe's first Universal theme park is being built in the UK with £1.3bn in taxpayer support, it has been announced.  Universal, which is owned by Sky News' US parent company Comcast, wants to open the attraction in 2031.  It is to be called Universal United Kingdom Resort and include a 500-room hotel and retail and entertainment complex.
